changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Insert the EDAN H99S/H60S CBC+DIFF analytes with no existing OE Test/LOINC (NEU%, EOS#/%, BAS#/%, NRBC#/%, RDW-SD, PCT, IMG#/%, RET#/%), reusing the WBC row's Hematology test_section when present (LIS-183).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test (id, name, description, loinc, is_active, is_reportable, orderable, test_section_id, guid, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_seq'), v.name, v.name, v.loinc, 'Y', 'Y', true, (SELECT t2.test_section_id FROM clinlims.test t2 WHERE t2.loinc = '6690-2' AND t2.test_section_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1), gen_random_uuid()::varchar, now() FROM (VALUES ('NEU%(Whole Blood)', '770-8'), ('EOS#(Whole Blood)', '711-2'), ('EOS%(Whole Blood)', '713-8'), ('BAS#(Whole Blood)', '704-7'), ('BAS%(Whole Blood)', '706-2'), ('NRBC#(Whole Blood)', '771-6'), ('NRBC%(Whole Blood)', '58413-6'), ('RDW-SD(Whole Blood)', '21000-5'), ('PCT(Whole Blood)', '51637-7'), ('IMG#(Whole Blood)', '53115-2'), ('IMG%(Whole Blood)', '38518-7'), ('RET#(Whole Blood)', '60474-4'), ('RET%(Whole Blood)', '17849-1') ) AS v(name, loinc) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc);

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H99S'

changeSet.comment: Seed the EDAN H99S analyzer (SETUP status, HL7 v2.3.1; transport configured by the operator at deploy) (LIS-183). fhir_uuid is set explicitly (like 004's backfill) so this insert satisfies the NOT NULL + UNIQUE fhir_uuid constraint 004 adds on deployments where it was applied.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer (id, name, description, is_active, status, protocol_version, analyzer_type, fhir_uuid, last_updated) VALUES (nextval('clinlims.analyzer_seq'), 'EDAN H99S', 'EDAN H90-series hematology analyzer (H99S/H60S), HL7 MLLP', true, 'SETUP', 'HL7_V2_3_1', 'HEMATOLOGY', gen_random_uuid(), now());

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H99S';

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H99S'

changeSet.comment: Map the 30 EDAN H99S CBC+DIFF wire codes (OBX-4, per the H90-series field-repurposing profile) to the OE Test carrying each LOINC, including both RDW-CV/RDW_CV and RDW-SD/RDW_SD separator spellings, so attachTestCodeLoinc emits the code->LOINC pairs the bridge applies (LIS-183). The EXISTS-test guard is a deliberate catalog dependency: the 13 diff/index analytes above are created by changeset 1 and always map, while the CBC/index/differential codes (WBC..MON%, RDW-CV) map only where their LOINC-bearing Test already exists — the LabSolution hematology catalog, reused not re-created here (the same dependency 049 has on Glucose/Creatinine). So on the target (bench/prod, catalog present) all 30 map; on a bare demo without the CBC catalog only the 14 seed-created analytes map (codes whose test is absent are skipped, never mapped to a NULL test_id).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer_test_map (analyzer_id, analyzer_test_name, test_id, last_updated) SELECT a.id, v.code, (SELECT min(t.id) FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc), now() FROM clinlims.analyzer a CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('WBC', '6690-2'), ('RBC', '789-8'), ('HGB', '718-7'), ('HCT', '4544-3'), ('MCV', '787-2'), ('MCH', '785-6'), ('MCHC', '786-4'), ('PLT', '777-3'), ('RDW-CV', '788-0'), ('RDW_CV', '788-0'), ('MPV', '32623-1'), ('NEU#', '751-8'), ('NEU%', '770-8'), ('LYM#', '731-0'), ('LYM%', '736-9'), ('MON#', '742-7'), ('MON%', '5905-5'), ('EOS#', '711-2'), ('EOS%', '713-8'), ('BAS#', '704-7'), ('BAS%', '706-2'), ('NRBC#', '771-6'), ('NRBC%', '58413-6'), ('RDW-SD', '21000-5'), ('RDW_SD', '21000-5'), ('PCT', '51637-7'), ('IMG#', '53115-2'), ('IMG%', '38518-7'), ('RET#', '60474-4'), ('RET%', '17849-1') ) AS v(code, loinc) WHERE a.name = 'EDAN H99S' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map m WHERE m.analyzer_id = a.id AND m.analyzer_test_name = v.code);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map WHERE analyzer_test_name IN ( 'NEU%', 'EOS#', 'EOS%', 'BAS#', 'BAS%', 'NRBC#', 'NRBC%', 'RDW-SD', 'RDW_SD', 'PCT', 'IMG#', 'IMG%', 'RET#', 'RET%') AND analyzer_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H99S');
